parameters.content:
## Nnltd_WF2: Daily Content Generation

### How it works

This workflow runs on a daily schedule to generate and queue LinkedIn-style content for the next day. It first checks whether tomorrow already has an approved scheduled post, then gathers recent posts, content pillars, total post counts, and curated candidate material from NocoDB. Gemini is used to create post copy and matching image prompts, generated images are uploaded to Cloudinary, NocoDB records are updated, and James is notified via Telegram when all posts are prepared.

### Setup steps

- Configure the Daily Schedule trigger with the desired run time and timezone, especially if posting times should align with UK time.
- Connect NocoDB credentials and verify the tables/fields used for recent posts, pillars, total post counts, curated candidates, scheduled posts, and image URL updates.
- Configure Google Gemini credentials/models for both text generation and image generation nodes.
- Connect Cloudinary credentials and set the target folder or upload options for generated images.
- Update the Telegram HTTP request URL with a valid bot token and chat ID for James, replacing the placeholder in the Notify James node.
- Review the custom code nodes for field names, date logic, approval status values, and posting-time assumptions so they match the database schema.

### Customization

Adjust the content pillar weighting, Gemini prompt structure, number of generated posts, LinkedIn posting slots, Cloudinary upload settings, and Telegram notification message to match the brand and publishing process.

## Schedule and queue gate

Starts the daily workflow and checks whether tomorrow already has an approved scheduled post, preventing duplicate generation when the queue is already filled.

## Gather content context

Fetches recent posts and pillar definitions from NocoDB, then normalizes the recent-post data so it can be safely used as context for generation.

## Count existing posts

Retrieves the total post count from NocoDB and collapses the result into a safe, compact value for downstream pillar assignment logic.

## Select curated input

Fetches a curated candidate from NocoDB, sanitizes it, and assigns content pillars using the weighted round-robin logic before prompt building.

## Generate post copy

Builds the Gemini prompt, calls Gemini to generate the daily content, and parses the model response into structured post data.

## Schedule and save posts

Splits the generated response into individual posts, assigns each one an expert-recommended schedule slot, and writes the new post records to NocoDB.

## Create and upload images

Builds an image prompt for each post, generates the image through Gemini, and uploads the result to Cloudinary.

## Attach image URLs

Extracts the hosted Cloudinary image URL and updates the corresponding NocoDB post record with the generated image information.

## Aggregate and notify

Aggregates all completed post items and sends a final notification to James through the configured Telegram HTTP request.
